text: The way that you can’t just buy it and play all the games. You have to buy a “play pass” these capitalist will get their recurring payments any way they can. I miss when media was purchased once and then we “owned” it. Nope $90 for 12 months of play is absurd.
text_zh: 你不能直接买了玩所有游戏。你得买个“Play Pass”。这些资本家想方设法都要赚你的循环付款。我怀念以前一次买断媒体就可以“拥有”的时代。不，90 美元买 12 个月玩，太离谱了。

text: omg guys plsss just go buy an old wii they are so so fun
text_zh: 哥们，求你们了，直接去买个老款Wii吧，太好玩了

text: cheaper alternative would just be going thrifting and looking for a wii and some games (you can get controllers at GameStop or on Ebay if you can't find them at the thrift)
text_zh: 更便宜的选择就是去旧货店淘个Wii和一些游戏（找不到的话可以在GameStop或eBay上买手柄）
